title: [Cobblemon] Anomalimon
body:
A Cobblemon data pack based on Abnormalities and characters from Lobotomy Corporation.
May also include elements from Library of Ruina and Limbus Company.
Reimagines Abnormalities as Pokémon with custom types, abilities, and moves.
Work in progress.
![Apocalypse Bird](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19485fdcb655eadc831066f442aa2175f4b637b4.png)
# Pokémon Acquisition

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
aridevoir
![arbidevoir](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b362cba061664fef2fd7c5b308416442e8593b8.png)
Gardevoir defeated one Arceus and one Regigigas.

apovoir
![apocalypse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/426dea0833880d969a507ff70805689a9ffc9c02.png)
No acquisition method yet

buttervoir
![buttervoir](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9916c5f02e4f4567d849efc104b2d4aaf6f86c43.png)
Gardevoir Lv.50 | Midnight | Ghost Gem

censored
![censored](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22a4ffd6e12194894795fe5754e3d8316f25bc93.png)
No acquisition method yet

despairoir
![despairoir](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75ebc41559a7ca6f61c5877569bf2c5de897d81e.png)
A Lv.50 Gardevoir with 200 affection used a Nether Star.

kesshiledge
![kesshiledge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dea2ce4afd75c9109418b91e72f843e8d7b775a6.png)
Skeledirge defeated three Bisharp.

rabbivoir
![rabbivoir](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b06c4ee3586e5e2270fc4bad445bd6a11ca61a03.png)
Gardevoir Lv.50 | Affection 100 | Netherite Chestplate

</details>

If you like this data pack, feel free to support me on [Afdian](https://afdian.com/a/ashes356)
